title: 36% of $250K Earners Live Paycheck to Paycheck
hook: One-third of Americans earning $250,000 still run out of money before payday — here's the psychology that keeps even high earners broke.
angle: Challenges the belief that earning more solves financial problems; explains Parkinson's Law of Money and the lifestyle inflation trap.
audience: Anyone who thinks their financial problems will be solved by a raise — employees at all income levels
key_numbers: 36% of $250K+ earners live paycheck to paycheck
78% of all Americans report living paycheck to paycheck
Average savings rate stays at 5-7% regardless of income level
